name: dMY Technology Group, Inc. VI
description: dMY Technology Group, Inc. VI is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus its search for a target business in the mobile app ecosystem and broader consumer internet sectors, including gaming, entertainment, education, e-commerce, dating, and wellness.
